body:
# Components

## Application Security Management (IAST)

* :bug: Skip XSS check for freemarker built-in escaping expressions in 2.3.24 instrumentation (#10865 - @jandro996)

## Application Security Management (WAF)

* :sparkles: Add server.request.body.filenames support for Tomcat and Netty 4.1 (#10973 - @jandro996)
* :sparkles: Add server.request.body.filenames AppSec address for commons-fileupload (#10949 - @jandro996)
* :sparkles::test_tube: Return AI Guard SDS findings into SDK Response (#10821 - @obordeau)
* :bug: Fix ObjectIntrospection exposing JDK internal toString() to the WAF (#10820 - @jandro996)
* :sparkles: Honor in-app blocking settings by default in AI Guard evaluate (#10818 - @smola)
* :bug: Fix HttpEndpointPostProcessor incorrectly overwriting span resource name (#10754 - @jandro996)
* :sparkles: Add http.status_code, error, and http.useragent to inferred proxy spans (#10749 - @jandro996)
* :bug: Fix content-type extraction for akka-http (#10742 - @jandro996)
* :sparkles::test_tube: Attach SDS findings to ai_guard spans (#10721 - @obordeau)
* :bug: Fix missing http.response.headers.content-type span tag on blocking responses (#10711 - @jandro996)
* :bug: Fix AWS API Gateway endpoints correlation HTTP span tags -  Inferred Proxy Spans (#10561 - @jandro996)

## Configuration

* :sparkles: Guarantee OTel Configs to run through `ConfigHelper` (#11057 - @mhlidd)
* :sparkles: Update `supported-configurations.json` w/ Missing Configs (#11046 - @mhlidd)
* :sparkles: Update JUnit Tests to run with `STRICT_TEST` mode by default (#11045 - @mhlidd)
* :sparkles: Update `ConfigHelper` to throw error in `STRICT_TEST` mode and capture undocumented Configs (#11031 - @mhlidd)

## Continuous Integration Visibility

* :bug: Include all candidate paths for duplicate keys in coverage reports (#10997 - @daniel-mohedano)
* :sparkles: Implement configuration error tagging for all backend requests (#10963 - @daniel-mohedano)
* :bug: Fix Test Management telemetry (#10962 - @daniel-mohedano)
* :sparkles: Add support for Weaver 0.12 release (#10903 - @daniel-mohedano)
* :sparkles: Consider empty parameters as null in TestIdentifier creation (#10902 - @daniel-mohedano)
* :sparkles: Add error tag for library configuration request (#10856 - @daniel-mohedano)
* :sparkles: Add Java 26 support to CI Visibility (#10839 - @daniel-mohedano)
* :sparkles::zap: Use HashingUtils hash in CI Visibility (#10784 - @dougqh)

## Crash Tracking

* :sparkles: Feature flag crashtracking extended info, and improve runtime args filtering (#11048 - @bric3)
* :bug: Unset `ld_preload` and `dyld_insert_libraries` for crashtracker child JVM (#11041 - @gyuheon0h)
* :sparkles: Report JVM argument flags for crash tracking (#11013 - @bric3)
* :sparkles: Reports loaded libraries in crashtracking reports (#11000 - @bric3)
* :bug::sparkles: Add crashtracking addresses and error thread name (#10984 - @bric3)
* :sparkles: Properly handle OpenJ9 crash report (#10976 - @bric3)
* :bug: Fix crashtracking siginfo missed some information (#10907 - @bric3)
* :bug: Change error tracking crashtracker source (#10848 - @amarziali)
* :bug: Unset inherited JVM env vars in crashtracking scripts (#10819 - @jbachorik)

## Database Monitoring

* :bug: Fix Oracle DBM trace correlation (#10829 - @azhou-datadog)

## Dynamic Instrumentation

* :bug: Fix NullPointerException in ExceptionProbe (#11051 - @jpbempel)
* :bug: Fix NullPointerException in Fingerprinter (#11049 - @jpbempel)
* :bug: Fix capture limit for capture expressions (#11042 - @jpbempel)
* :bug: Fix CodeOrigin for interface endpoints (#11017 - @jpbempel)
* :sparkles: Optimize Lambda proxy class matching on filtering (#10905 - @jpbempel)
* :bug: Fix Kotlin fake source mapping (#10880 - @jpbempel)
* :bug: Fix NullPointerException in SymbolExtractor (#10858 - @jpbempel)
* :bug: Handle exception from retrieving git info (#10853 - @jpbempel)
* :bug: Change MethodParameters detection reporting (#10849 - @jpbempel)
* :bug: Prevent retransforming record with type annotation (#10824 - @jpbempel)
* :bug: Prevent instrumenting debugger agent classes (#10803 - @jpbempel)
* :bug: Catch exception from detecting MethodParameters (#10779 - @jpbempel)
* :bug: Prevent instrumenting first line of a constructor (#10772 - @jpbempel)
* :bug: Catch exceptions in registerSourceFile (#10752 - @jpbempel)
* :bug: Use SpringVersion to detect MethodParameters usage (#10750 - @jpbempel)
* :bug: Fix Spring detection (#10740 - @jpbempel)
* :bug: Add an error sampler for Log probes (#10638 - @jpbempel)

## Logs Product

* :bug: Fix check raw file injection smoke test (#10920 - @bm1549)

## ML Observability (LLMObs)

* :sparkles: Propagate global dd_tags to LLMObs span tags (#10978 - @ygree)
* :bug: Fix openai-java payload mapping for responses, tool metadata, and prompt tracking (#10644 - @ygree)

## Metrics

* :sparkles: Add GitCommitSha to the client stats (#10833 - @amarziali)
* :bug: Report gRPC status code in client-computed stats (#10805 - @bric3)
* :sparkles::zap: Reduce memory allocation from client-side stats (#10705 - @dougqh)
* :sparkles: Reduce verbosity of StatsD connection errors (#10618 - @PerfectSlayer)

## OpenFeature

* :bug: Allow null targeting key for static and rule-only flags (#10990 - @leoromanovsky)

## Platform

* :sparkles: Add HTTP component API module (#10770 - @PerfectSlayer)

## Profiling

* :sparkles: Enable live heap profiling by default on safe JVM versions (#11039 - @jbachorik)
* :sparkles: Update Java profiler library to 1.40.1 (#10995 - @jbachorik)
* :sparkles: Remove experimental jvmti wallclock profiler (#10872 - @zhengyu123)

## Telemetry

* :sparkles: Update Environment Variable Normalization to not add DD prefix for OTel Configs (#11044 - @mhlidd)
* :bug: Report dd-java-agent itself as a Maven dependency in SCA telemetry (#10975 - @jandro996)
* :sparkles: Add stable session ID headers to telemetry requests (#10914 - @khanayan123)
* :sparkles: Update Telemetry Key Normalization to Use Environment Variables (#10823 - @mhlidd)
* :sparkles::zap: Replace Objects.hash with HashingUtils.hash in telemetry (#10813 - @dougqh)
* :sparkles::zap: Reduce allocation overhead of ExceptionLogger / LogCollector (#10684 - @dougqh)

## Testing

* :sparkles: Update JUnit Tests to run with `STRICT_TEST` mode by default (#11045 - @mhlidd)
* :bug: Fix final_status workaround (#10852 - @cbeauchesne)
* :broom: Refactor tests following Java migration (#10733 - @jpbempel)

## Trace context propagation

* :bug: Improve VirtualThread context tracking instrumentation (#11009 - @PerfectSlayer)
* :bug: Fix VirtualThread support on multiple unmount/remount cycles  (#10931 - @PerfectSlayer)

## Tracer core

* :sparkles: Use TagMap.set in CoreTracer tracer tags (#11004 - @dougqh)
* :sparkles::zap: Replace interceptors ConcurrentSkipListSet with priority ordered copy on write "list" (#11002 - @dougqh)
* :sparkles::zap: Cache Tracer Host Entry to reduce allocation in RemoteHostnameAdder (#10968 - @dougqh)
* :sparkles: Add ObjectInputStream.readObject to forbidden apis (#10952 - @dougqh)
* :sparkles: Add ParentBasedAlwaysOnSampler as default sampler for OTLP trace export mode (#10915 - @mtoffl01)
* :bug: Handle the case the info response does not contain endpoints / empty (#10838 - @amarziali)
* :sparkles::zap: Use forEach to avoid Iterator allocation (#10830 - @dougqh)
* :sparkles::zap: Avoid ArrayList copying from TraceInterceptors (#10828 - @dougqh)
* :sparkles::zap: Avoid creation of empty CopyOnWriteArrayList for span links (#10822 - @dougqh)
* :sparkles: Update BaseHash when process tags are updated (#10809 - @amarziali)
* :sparkles: Add _dd.p.ksr propagated tag for Knuth sampling rate (#10802 - @bm1549)
* :sparkles: Add capped sampling rate increases (#10715 - @raphaelgavache)
* :sparkles::zap: Avoid boxing by using TagMap.set in PayloadTagsProcessor (#10964 - @dougqh)
* :sparkles::test_tube:  Add tracing support for native method calls via Java FFM API (#10718 - @amarziali) 

## Tracer internal logging

* :sparkles: Add app log collection config value in toString (#10725 - @jpbempel)

# Instrumentations

## Apache Spark instrumentation

* :bug: Fix EMR Spark support by using Seq instead of ArrayBuffer for externalAccums (#10987 - @aboitreaud)
* :bug: Fix spark application spans status on sql analysis failure (#10981 - @aboitreaud)
* :bug: Fix sql plan nodes order causing test flakiness (#10911 - @aboitreaud)
* :bug: Fix flaky test assertion by normalizing column ref and plan_id num (#10757 - @aboitreaud)
* :sparkles: Capture time app-related metrics for launchers (#10708 - @aboitreaud)
* :bug: Remove Wrong Spark Spans for Inactive Databricks Clusters (#10651 - @larakulkarni1)
* :sparkles: Store accumulator-stage lookups directly (#10645 - @charlesmyu)
* :sparkles: Track external accumulators in tracer instead of using SparkInfo values (#10553 - @charlesmyu)

## Armeria Instrumentation

* :bug: Report gRPC status code in client-computed stats (#10805 - @bric3)

## AWS SDK instrumentation

* :bug: Inject APM trace headers into SQS _datadog message attribute on send (#10843 - @ygree)

## Core Java language instrumentation

* :bug: Improve VirtualThread context tracking instrumentation (#11009 - @PerfectSlayer)
* :bug: Fix VirtualThread support on multiple unmount/remount cycles  (#10931 - @PerfectSlayer)
* :broom: Disable outdated RMI instrumentation (#10897 - @PerfectSlayer)
* :bug::closed_lock_with_key: Use primitive types for RMI context payload serialization (#10935 - @PerfectSlayer)
* :sparkles: Mute tracing for agent http calls (#10690 - @PerfectSlayer)

## gRPC instrumentation

* :bug: Report gRPC status code in client-computed stats (#10805 - @bric3)

## JDBC instrumentation

* :bug: Avoid IndexOutOfBound when parsing dbInfo without host (#10835 - @amarziali)
* :sparkles::zap: Replace Objects.hash with HashingUtils in DBInfo (#10783 - @dougqh)

## Kafka instrumentation

* :bulb: Capture kafka producer and consumer configs (#10697 - @piochelepiotr)

## OpenTelemetry instrumentation

* :bulb: Support sending OpenTelemetry metrics over OTLP (http/protobuf) (#11055 - @mcculls)

## Spring instrumentation

* :bug: Fix Spring messaging Kotlin async aware instrumentation (#11047 - @ygree)
* :sparkles: Support CompletableFuture on Spring Messaging Spans (#10979 - @mhlidd)

## All other instrumentations

* :broom: Separate context tracking from tracing on http client instrumentations (#10782 - @amarziali)
* :broom: Split tracing and context tracking in server and messaging integrations (#10767 - @amarziali)
